title: Domain + DNS full audit

findings.subject: Cloudflare zones
findings.recommended_action: Classify ACTIVE/GHOST/PENDING and remove ghost zones only after approval.

findings.subject: viewport.llc migration routes
findings.finding: Route tests: {'/migration/': '200 text/html; charset=utf-8', '/migration/plan': '200 text/html; charset=utf-8', '/migration/task': '200 text/html; charset=utf-8', '/migration/audit': '200 text/html; charset=utf-8'}
findings.recommended_action: Keep Worker route as audit/migration publishing surface.

findings.subject: Ghost/no-record zones
findings.finding: 21 zones have no DNS records by API.
findings.recommended_action: Mark DELETE/KEEP with registrar/business reason in domain registry.

findings.subject: bccl.la NS/registrar
findings.finding: Registrar/nameserver flip not fully verified by registrar API in this pass; public DNS lookup captured only.
findings.recommended_action: Query Name.com/registrar API in Section 5 follow-up; answer binary NS flip after authoritative NS evidence.

recommended_action: Finish registrar-level bccl.la verification and create domain-service map for subdomains vs containers.
